description_long: This is a roadside traffic sign mounted on a tall, cylindrical black post. The sign itself is diamond-shaped with a yellow background and a black border, featuring a pictogram of a gas pump and the word 'GAS' in bold black letters beneath the icon. The post appears to be made of metal, likely steel, and is vertically ribbed for structural strength. The sign is designed to be highly visible to passing motorists, with its reflective yellow surface ensuring visibility in various lighting conditions. The back of the sign is plain and unmarked, while the sides reveal the thin profile of the metal sign plate. This type of sign is commonly used to indicate the presence of a nearby gas station or fuel service area.
description: A yellow diamond-shaped 'GAS' traffic sign with a gas pump icon, mounted on a tall black metal post.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow diamond sign with a gas pump pictogram and the word 'GAS' clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the sign and the cylindrical post, with the sign plate barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain back of the diamond sign and the supporting post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the thin edge of the sign and the post, with minimal detail visible.
attribute_symbol_or_pictogram: A black pictogram of a gas pump.
